para.verbatim: This function Initializes CfgPtr and Device for FZetta Control

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization is successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function Perform register write according to FMC device type to access.

detaileddescription.para: Dev = device type (IIC_Dev or SPI_Dev) Channel = SDI Channel to access Slave_Sel = SPI slave type (SPI_RCLKR, SPI_DRVR, SPI_RCVR) RegAddr = 7-bit register to access RegData = data to write

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if register write is successful else XST_FAILURE

memberdef.argsstring: (fzetta_dev_type Dev, u8 Channel, spi_slave_sel Slave_Sel, u8 RegAddr)
memberdef.name: fzetta_fmc_register_read

briefdescription.para: This function Perform register read according to FMC device type to access.

detaileddescription.para: Dev = device type (IIC_Dev or SPI_Dev) Channel = SDI Channel to access Slave_Sel = SPI slave type (SPI_RCLKR, SPI_DRVR, SPI_RCVR) RegAddr = 7-bit register to access

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if register read is successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function Perform FZETTA FMC IIC and SPI devices Initialization based on Initialization table.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization is successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function Perform Reclocker Device Errate Initialization.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization is successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function Perform Stop IIC, GPIO and SPI IP.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if fmc stop is successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function Perform Initialize FMC and its control IPs.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization is successful else XST_FAILURE
